data.title: Cloudvirga Integrates Plaid Into Tropos Platform
data.description: A company based in Irvine, California, Cloudvirga, owned by Stewart, has revealed a recent collaboration with Plaid. Plaid is a leading data network within the digital financial sector. This new integration aims to enhance income and asset verification processes. The partnership with Plaid allows for a more streamlined verification process for lenders and consumers alike. By utilizing Plaid's top-tier data network, Cloudvirga's platform, Tropos, now offers simplified income, asset, and employment verification services. This collaboration will greatly benefit users by providing more efficient verification procedures.

data.title: Mazda Reports Best-Ever June Sales Results
data.description: Mazda North American Operations (MNAO) announced that they sold a total of 37,167 vehicles in June 2026, marking an 11.3 percent increase from June 2025. Year-to-date sales reached 201,834 vehicles, showing a 4 percent drop compared to the same period last year.

data.title: CGTN: What drives people's trust in China's governing party?
data.description: CGTN recently released an article commemorating the 105th anniversary of the establishment of the Communist Party of China. The piece delves into the reasons behind the broad public trust and support garnered by the ruling party. It emphasizes the Party's focus on the people's well-being and its efforts in fostering a fairer society.

data.title: July 1 marks the start of negotiations for the U.S.-Mexico-Canada trade deal, which Trump has often criticized.
data.description: On July 1, a critical trade agreement that President Trump has frequently denigrated could either face its demise or potentially set the stage for its revival. This significant development marks a pivotal juncture in the fate of the trade pact.

data.title: 10Beauty Raises $23.5M Led by Story Ventures to Expand Robotic Manicures to Retail and Salons
data.description: A company based in Burlington, Massachusetts, known as 10Beauty, has recently secured $23.5 million in funding. This investment round was led by Story Ventures. The funding will be utilized by 10Beauty to further develop and expand its robotic manicure services for retail and salon settings.

data.title: Hundreds of American Craft Artists Invite Public Into Their Studios During National Craft Open Studios Weekend, July 18 & 19
data.description: Minneapolis will host the inaugural National Craft Open Studios Weekend on July 18 and 19, where the public can visit the studios of over 100 craft artists for free. This unique event offers a behind-the-scenes look at the tools, processes, and inspirations that drive handmade creations. Not only does it give visitors a chance to explore different creative spaces, but it also provides crucial support to craft artists during their sales season. This initiative aims to showcase the diverse talents in the craft industry and promote appreciation for handmade works among the American audience.

data.title: Allstates WorldCargo Adds Reverse Logistics Product Offering to Service Portfolio
data.description: Allstates WorldCargo, a top provider of tailored logistics services, has expanded its offerings by acquiring the Asset Recovery Division of One Source Freight Solutions. This move enhances Allstates WorldCargo’s capabilities in providing specialized reverse logistics and asset recovery services. The acquisition aims to bolster the company's support for clients in sectors like technology and retail by offering white-glove solutions. The addition of this division complements their existing portfolio, strengthening their position in the market.

data.title: Marcus Theatres Records Highest June Revenue of All Time
data.description: Marcus Theatres, a division of Marcus Corporation (NYSE: MCS) in Milwaukee, reported its highest-ever total revenue for June. The success was fueled by the exceptional reception of Toy Story 5, alongside a diverse lineup featuring Scary Movie and Disclosure Day. The company experienced continued strong viewer interest, resulting in a record-breaking month.

data.title: Velosio Deepens its Investment as a Top Microsoft Partner with Acquisitions of Kopis and Acuitas
data.description: Velosio, a major Microsoft partner in the United States, has made two significant acquisitions on July 1, 2026, to enhance its Azure, business applications, and AI expertise. These transactions aim to broaden Velosio's Microsoft offerings and reach a more extensive customer base.

data.title: TCBY® Celebrates 45 Years of Sweet Connections Over The Country's Best Yogurt
data.description: The iconic frozen yogurt brand TCBY is marking its 45th anniversary with a series of special events, promotions, and a summer-long celebration highlighting its rich history. Founded in 1981, TCBY has become a household name in the frozen yogurt industry. The brand is known for its innovative flavors and commitment to providing customers with delicious and nutritious treats. Throughout the anniversary festivities, customers can expect to enjoy exciting experiences and exclusive deals in honor of TCBY's milestone achievement.

data.title: In HelloNation, Tax Expert Dr. LaTonya Perryman Explains How Audit Protection Helps Taxpayers
data.description: A recent report emphasizes the significance of readiness, record-keeping, and expert advice in aiding taxpayers in effectively addressing IRS communications. As of July 1, 2026 in CLARKSDALE, Miss., individuals are advised on appropriate steps to take upon receiving IRS notifications. HelloNation offers insights into navigating these situations, ensuring individuals can handle IRS inquiries with assurance.
GSR V Acquisition Corp. Announces the Separate Trading of its Shares of Class A Ordinary Shares and Commencing July 2, 2026

data.title: Hyundai Motor Brings 'Next Starts Now' To Life For Youth Players Through NYFEST And Metropolitan Oval Academy
data.description: Hyundai Motor has partnered with NYFEST and the Metropolitan Oval Academy in an effort to motivate and nurture young football talent. Ten exceptional athletes have been chosen for a unique opportunity to participate in a special FIFA World Cup 2026™ match and to explore the FIFA Museum, all sponsored by Hyundai. The collaboration aims to inspire the next generation of players and provide them with an unforgettable experience.

data.title: High Income Securities Fund Announces Monthly Distributions For Third Quarter of 2026
data.description: On July 1, 2026, the High Income Securities Fund (NYSE: PCF) disclosed its latest update regarding distributions. The Fund's Board of Trustees declared the upcoming three monthly distributions as part of the Fund's managed distribution plan. This announcement signifies the Board's decision to distribute earnings to investors over the next three months through planned disbursements.

data.title: SUTNTIB AB Tewox publishes its NAV for June 2026
data.description: In Vilnius, Lithuania, as of June 30, 2026, the net asset value (NAV) of SUTNTIB AB Tewox dropped to EUR 46,104,542 from EUR 46,466,874 recorded at the end of May 2026. The decrease in NAV amounted to EUR 362,332 between the two months.
Energy Intel Deputy Bureau Chief Bakr: Little over 5 ln BPD of crude oil exited Hormuz in June. Just 1/3 of normal flows pre-war.

data.title: Improving Appoints Ashok Iyengar as Executive Vice President of Global Services
data.description: Earlier today in Dallas, Improving, a contemporary digital services company, revealed the selection of Ashok Iyengar as the Executive Vice President of Global Services. Iyengar will be taking charge of Improving's Global Services sales strategy in the newly established position.

data.title: New Brief Reveals Virginia Faces Critical Nursing Shortage as Demand for Healthcare Workers Surges
data.description: A recent report commissioned by ECPI University reveals a lack of synchronization between education systems and workforce demands, resulting in over 17,000 vacant registered nurse positions in Virginia. The study, released on July 1, 2026, highlights the significant shortage of nurses across the Commonwealth, affecting healthcare services.

data.title: Global Oncology-Based In-Vivo CRO Market to Accelerate Substantially at a CAGR of ~8% by 2034 | DelveInsight
data.description: The market for in-vivo CRO focused on oncology is experiencing strong expansion due to the growing global cancer burden and the rising need for preclinical oncology investigations. Pharmaceutical and biotechnology firms are increasingly subcontracting in-vivo research to specialized CROs in light of this trend. This growth trend is reflected in a notable increase in market demand, with a significant rise in the number of companies outsourcing oncology-based in-vivo studies to CROs. Thus, the market is witnessing a surge in activity, driven by a sharp increase in demand for specialized oncology research services.

data.title: A Turning Point for Public School Facilities: Districts Modernized Decades-Old Community Use Policies in 2025-26
data.description: As school districts across the nation implement a new governance framework, there is a growing emphasis on stewardship, sustainability, and accountability in managing public facilities. This initiative has seen enterprise-scale deployments in some of the largest school systems in the country. Reporting from Los Gatos, California on July 1, 2026.
